appetite.title: Pathpoint Platform Overview
appetite.description: Overview of Pathpoint's digital E&S wholesale platform — coverage types, verticals, carrier network, and how to get started.

appetite.title: Contractors Appetite Guide
appetite.description: Pathpoint's appetite for contractor risks — eligible classes, ISO codes, GL and excess limits, subcontracted work, and carrier markets in 48 states.

appetite.title: General Liability Appetite Guide
appetite.description: General liability coverage limits and eligible verticals across contractors, lessor's risk, restaurants, manufacturing, retail, and vacant buildings.

appetite.title: Commercial Property Appetite Guide
appetite.description: Commercial property coverage including TIV limits by vertical, coastal property, older buildings, wind deductibles, and eligible occupancy classes.

appetite.title: Lessor's Risk (LRO) Appetite Guide
appetite.description: Lessor's Risk Only coverage for residential and commercial building owners — GL, property, and package options with limits up to $15M TIV.

appetite.title: Restaurants, Bars & Taverns Appetite Guide
appetite.description: GL and property coverage for food service operations — ANSUL system requirements, eligible classes, and $2M/$2M GL limits.

appetite.title: Cyber Liability Appetite Guide
appetite.description: Cyber liability for SMBs — up to $3M limits, retentions as low as $1,000, admitted markets, and eligible business classes.

appetite.title: Vacant Buildings & Land Appetite Guide
appetite.description: GL and property coverage for vacant properties — flexible terms, coastal properties, buildings from 1850, and properties under renovation.

appetite.title: Excess Casualty Appetite Guide
appetite.description: Excess casualty coverage from $1M to $5M written over A-rated primary carriers for contractors and lessor's risk accounts.

appetite.title: Monoline Property Appetite Guide
appetite.description: Standalone commercial property coverage up to $30M TIV — coastal properties, older buildings, special form, replacement cost, and earthquake.

appetite.title: Manufacturing Appetite Guide
appetite.description: GL with products liability for 500+ manufacturing classes nationwide — apparel, food, cannabis, medical devices, new ventures, and home-based businesses.

appetite.title: Retail & Services Appetite Guide
appetite.description: GL and package quotes for main street retail and service businesses — salons, food trucks, retail stores, and 50+ eligible business classes.
